question: Are Reasonable Faith and Ratio Christi officially involved with CCC?
answer: Yes, this is an official partnership between all three ministries with their respective Directors involved in the oversight and planning of this programme.

question: What does the training programme look like?
answer: Through CCC, candidates will master the contents of the 3rd edition of Reasonable Faith book and complete the Reasonable Faith Study Guide successfully to be inducted into Reasonable Faith as Chapter Directors in India.

question: If I want to be a Chapter Director with Reasonable Faith, is CCC the only way for me to do so?
answer: Absolutely not! Anyone at anytime from anywhere in the world can apply directly to Reasonable Faith to be a Chapter Director.

question: Why is CCC developed if I can apply without CCC?
answer: Chapter Director certification with Reasonable Faith demands rigorous effort and commitment. In 2025 only 7.8% applications were successfully completed and inducted. CCC provides a supportive and disciplined pipeline for aspiring apologists to successfully complete the certification. The community of fellow applicants and the resource experts provide assistance to better understand the text and complete the certification in a structured manner. Everyone needs a helping hand. CCC is that helping hand.

question: How long is the programme?
answer: CCC's first batch will run for 6 months from the 1st week of April. Over the 6 months, all 8 chapters of the text (Reasonable Faith 3rd Edition) will be covered.

question: Will there be tutors or speakers taking sessions?
answer: This is a self-learning programme that is guided by the CCC Team in accordance with a pre-planned schedule developed in consultation with Reasonable Faith. While the candidates are responsible to meet the stipulated portion deadlines in each Sprint (a Sprint = 3 weeks), resource experts from SAFT and Reasonable Faith will be always available to guide and help understand the text.

question: Where is this programme taking place?
answer: CCC is completely virtual. However each Sprint culminates with a Zoom session attended by all candidates.

question: What are the fees for the programme?
I want to know more about Reasonable Faith Chapters. Where can I find that information?
answer: You can know all about Reasonable Faith Chapters on the Reasonable Faith website.

question: What are the requirements to enroll?
answer: You need to fill up the application form and commit to abide by the programme schedule (including attending the Zoom sessions at the end of each Sprint).

question: Is this programme open to only Indians / Indians residing in India?
answer: The focus of CCC are Indians residing in India. However Non Resident Indians are welcome to apply. If you are not a citizen of India and you want to be part of the CCC programme, email us at ccc@saftapologetics.com.

question: Where can I find more information about Reasonable Faith and Ratio Christi?
answer: The websites of Reasonable Faith and Ratio Christi provide detailed information about their ministry.

question: I want to know more about the programme before I sign up. Where can I reach out to know more?
answer: You can join the briefing sessions scheduled to run on different days across the month of March. You can select your preferred slot while you fill out the application form. For further details about the briefing sessions or for any assistance, reach out to us at ccc@saftapologetics.com.
